- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] Overall coverage below 80% threshold**

  - **Likely cause:** Many packages have no test files; engine/server coverage below 60%.
  - **Proposed solution:** Hand off to `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage` → `/03-gh-go` for targeted test improvements. Advisory only (no hard gate).
